1020.name: Drauglyen's Tooth
1020.description: It seems to glow in the dark very slightly with a purple hue

1040.name: Forgotten Ledger
1040.description: Green trogs haunt tunnels. Their whispers trouble unwary adventurers.

1041.name: Blightchosen Gospel
1041.description:
Don't believe your eyes. 
This world is not as it seems.

1067.name: Herdith's Letter
1067.description: A small letter with a wax seal.

1072.name: Mr. Fluffles
1072.description: Cute and cuddly, except when you forget to feed it.

1082.name: Ghastly Fangs
1082.description: They're laced with red lines that seem to glow in the dark very slightly with a purple hue

1083.name: Collection of Teeth
1083.description: Drauglyen's Tooth and Ghastly Fangs. They just barely glow purple in the dark, said to worth a high price to the right buyer.

1084.name: Collection of Teeth
1084.description: Drauglyen's Tooth and Ghastly Fangs. Hopefully they're worth something, at least.

1112.name: Lucky Ring
1112.description: God plays dice with the world

1127.name: Tower Key
1127.description: An ancient iron key unlocking the archduke's tower that's in poor condition and will only work once.

1131.name: Keys to the Barracks
1131.description: They're fragile and won't work more than once.

1132.name: Command Ledger
1132.description: A war ledger from Atmar's final days, recording commands against Kandorys, abandoned in the Lower Garrison as the kingdom fell to ruin.

1134.name: Undercourse Key
1134.description: Blackened brass key humming softly, opening the Undercourse beneath the Dale.

1135.name: Depleted Key
1135.description: A blackened brass key, though it appears damaged. Search the Dale for an item to restore this key.

1139.name: Demiplane Key
1139.description: Demiplanes are said to be created by archmages bending reality. The symbols bear the mark of Kandorys.

1143.name: Major Treasury Gold
1143.description: A compact fortune of gleaming gold bars, prized by merchants and alchemists alike, spendable as wealth or consumed in powerful transmutation rituals.

1144.name: Arcane Essence
1144.description: Condensed spellpower dropped by a fallen Archwizard, this essence fuels epic crafting, grand rituals, and ancient enchantments.

1145.name: Treasury Gold
1145.description: One golden bar, prized by merchants and alchemists alike, spendable as wealth or consumed in transmutation rituals.

1146.name: Treasury Coins
1146.description: Coins of St. Revere used by merchants and alchemists alike, spendable as wealth or consumed in transmutation rituals.

1147.name: Sanctum Key
1147.description: ...haec loca minora a sagis potentissimis realitatem flectentibus creari dicuntur...

1153.name: Inactive Demiplane Key
1153.description: The key is inert, though demiplanes are said to be created by archmages bending reality.

1154.name: Magic Dust
1154.description: This fine magical dust is used in crafting, experiments, and transmutation to reshape matter.

1155.name: Salmaster's Key
1155.description: The key glows with faint energy and malevolence. It won't work more than once.

1156.name: Keys to St. Revere
1156.description: They're fragile and won't work more than once.

1237.name: Draconic Treasure
1237.description: Gleaming gold and gems, a taste of true wyrm wealth.
